ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student (e.g., E/11/381) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instructor (e.g., I/11/001) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course (e.g., CS101) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" REAL /* Credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "assessment_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assessment type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_scores" (
  "assessment_score_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assessment score */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the instructors table */,
  "assessment_type_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the assessment_types table */,
  "semester_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the semesters table */,
  "year_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the years table */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the student for the assessment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor for the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_assessment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_type_id") REFERENCES assessment_types ("assessment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_scales" (
  "grade_scale_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each grade scale */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the grade scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade scale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_weights" (
  "grade_weight_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each grade weight */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "assessment_type_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the assessment_types table */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assessment in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_weights_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_weights_assessment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_type_id") REFERENCES assessment_types ("assessment_type_id")
)
